title: Recreate a Sports Jersey Font (A–Z, 0–9) as Clean Vector SVG / EPS / AI from a Reference Image
one_line_ask: Turn two photographed jersey-font reference sheets (letters A–Z and numbers 0–9) into clean, print-ready vector artwork and deliver SVG + EPS + AI for both sets.

issues: Slight tilt and uneven lighting (brighter on left), but within brief tolerance.
Faint cool color cast and visible knit texture, as intended.
Minor export haloing and soft edges, acceptable per brief.
No visible severe AI artifacts or branding.
Slight left-to-right luminance gradient (brighter left) present as intended
Faint knit/polyester texture visible throughout — acceptable per brief
Very mild cool color cast on fabric — acceptable per brief
Numbers increase slightly in apparent size toward right edge, minor optical inconsistency
Fabric has slight wrinkle/fold running diagonally — acceptable documentary realism
Image dimensions appear closer to square crop than specified 2400x900 ratio, but composition is clean
Slight tilt (~3 degrees) and uneven lighting (one corner brighter), but these are per brief and not penalized.
Very minor shadowing and color cast, consistent with phone photo.
No severe artifacts, all glyphs are legible, evenly spaced, and consistent in weight.
No visible real-world branding or trademarks.
Texture and sheen of polyester fabric are visible and realistic.
No major composition or focus issues.
Slight vignetting in top-right corner reduces uniformity marginally
Row sizing increases toward bottom which may complicate uniform trace scaling
Fabric texture visible but moire is minimal — acceptable per brief
Very slight diagonal tilt of composition (within acceptable <=5deg threshold for source file)
Minimal luminance noise visible in white polyester body area (acceptable/expected for source)
Soft edge transition at collar-body seam boundary (acceptable for source file)

assets.name: letters_AZ_master.ai
assets.note: Client-provided .ai template; represented here as an authored text proxy (binary Adobe format not synthesizable).

assets.name: numbers_09_master.ai
assets.note: Client-provided .ai template; represented here as an authored text proxy (binary Adobe format not synthesizable).
